data.サブタイトル: The Yamato seasonal tea ceremony experience
data.体験の特徴:
Learn about the history and culture of the Japanese tea ceremony
Enjoy a bowl of matcha served with a seasonal Japanese sweet
Spend a quiet moment in the tea room, calming your mind and feeling the changing seasons

data.サブタイトル: Hojicha Roasting Experience in a 120-Year-Old Machiya
data.体験の特徴:
Immerse yourself in the art of tea-making in a 120-year-old machiya
Taste five varieties of locally produced teas from Nara
Learn to hand-roast tea leaves to create your own Hojicha

data.集合場所: In front of the Gyoki Bosatsu Statue, Kintetsu Nara Station
data.サブタイトル: Sacred Deer, Lantern Walk with Hidden Views
data.体験の特徴:
Experience the serene beauty of Nara after dark on a guided night walk
Discover hidden night views and sacred deer most visitors never see
Walk the quiet corridors of Todai-ji Nigatsu-do Hall after hours

data.サブタイトル: Sacred Deer, Lantern Walk with Hidden Views
data.体験の特徴:
Create your own ceramic deer figurine in a hands-on workshop in Nara
Stroll through Nara Park and find a deer that inspires your creation
Learn from a Nara-based artist celebrated for his expressive sculptures
